summary: Upwork announced a restructuring plan expected to reduce its workforce by approximately 24%, with CEO Hayden Brown telling employees the company had rethought every function around people and technology and that AI lets smaller product and engineering teams have more impact.
evidenceQuote: AI means smaller, differently resourced teams in product and engineering can make a bigger impact than ever.
notes: Upwork's Form 8-K gives the official reduction as approximately 24% of the company's workforce. Final Round AI estimated the absolute impact at about 145 jobs out of a 600-person headcount; because the company source gives only a percentage, the count should be treated as a secondary estimate. This is classified as explicit AI cited because the CEO memo directly links the new team structure to AI-enabled smaller teams.

sources.name: Upwork SEC Form 8-K
sources.quote: The Restructuring Plan includes an expected reduction of the Company's total workforce by approximately 24%.

sources.name: Upwork CEO employee memo
sources.quote: AI means smaller, differently resourced teams in product and engineering can make a bigger impact than ever.

sources.name: Final Round AI
sources.quote: On May 7, 2026, Upwork announced it was cutting approximately 24% of its workforce, about 145 jobs out of a 600-person headcount.
